changelog: Fixed: downloading a file that redirects through multiple links (e.g. some installer download pages) no longer opens two duplicate download windows
Fixed: right-clicking a video embedded from another site (e.g. RedGifs on Reddit) now sends the real video link instead of a broken internal browser link
Improved: the right-click download menu no longer shows duplicate entries for the same video
Fixed: right-clicking a video thumbnail (e.g. on the YouTube home page) now shows the "Download media with Aither" option
Fixed: YouTube no longer shows two overlapping download buttons for the same video after switching videos
Fixed: downloading from the browser extension no longer force-opens the main window when the app is minimized to the tray
